ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani homers in Dodgers' 8-6 win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani hits a home run and Kyle Tucker drives in two in the Dodgers' 8-6 win over the Pirates

imanaga.title: Sterlin Thompson walks it off in the 9th for 3-2 win
imanaga.blurb: Sterlin Thompson delivers a pinch-hit single in the bottom of the 9th to secure the Rockies' 3-2 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Seiya Suzuki's grand slam sets tone in Cubs' 9-3 win
suzuki.blurb: Seiya Suzuki hits a grand slam and the Cubs get home runs from Alex Bregman and Carson Kelly in their 9-3 victory over the Rockies

yoshida.title: Rasmussen records a career-high 13 K's in Rays' win
yoshida.blurb: Drew Rasmussen's career-high 13 K's and scoreless start leads the Rays to a 7-5 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Home runs back Luzardo in Phillies' 7-4 win
okamoto.blurb: Bryce Harper, Alec Bohm and Kyle Schwarber homer to back Jesús Luzardo, who strikes out eight in the Phillies' 7-4 win vs. the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Sal Stewart's go-ahead homer leads Reds to 5-3 win
matsui.blurb: Sal Stewart hits a go-ahead homer in the 11th and Chase Burns strikes out seven batters to lead the Reds to a 5-3 win over the Padres
